title: dictamnus albus var. obtusiflorus
intro: Dictamnus albus var. obtusiflorus, also known as the fragrant or rock dictamnus, is a perennial plant species in the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Dictamnus albus var. obtusiflorus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
